scope: Cycle 15: Bug hunt C14 (merlin_card_system.gd faction boost) + fix oghams_used/minigames_won tracking + run_history

bugs_found.description: oghams_used never tracked — Run3DController.stop_run() data dict always has 0 for oghams_used. Anam rewards for ogham usage always 0.
bugs_found.fix: Added _oghams_used_this_run counter, increment in on_ogham_activated(), include in stop_run() data.

bugs_found.description: minigames_won never included in stop_run() data for GFC path. Anam rewards for minigame wins always 0 via GFC.
bugs_found.fix: Added _minigames_won_this_run and _minigames_played_this_run counters, increment in _on_minigame_completed(), include in stop_run() data.

overall_assessment: Cycle 15: Bug hunt C14 found 0 bugs in faction boost code. Discovered and fixed 2 HIGH bugs in Run3DController reward data pipeline. Added run_history tracking for metagame progression. 27 total bugs fixed across 15 cycles.
